chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1214 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 27-09-2023 Petitioner Muhammad Iqbal present in person Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General a/w Masroor Solangi, XEN Provincial Highway Division Naushahro Feroze.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition for completing construction of road leading from Ahmed Kandiaro to Kandhra via Achi Masjid, Taluka Kandiaro (08 K.Ms.). Masroor Solangi, Executive Engineer Provincial Highways Division Naushahro Feroze has appeared along with photographs and submits that road has been completed. Apparently this petition has served its purpose, accordingly the same is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
